bids.reasoning: The opponent's opening offer is extremely disadvantageous to me, and their "final offer" ultimatum at t=0.0 is a common cheap-talk tactic to falsely force an early deadline. Since it is the very beginning of the negotiation, I will disregard their threat and firmly anchor the negotiation by proposing the values that maximize my own utility across all issues.

I will signal a willingness to negotiate by making a minor concession on issueC from valueA to valueB, while maintaining my ideal choices on all other issues, especially my heavily-weighed issueA.
